nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栗背蚁鵙
nodes.summary: 栗背蚁鵙（Chestnut-backed antshrike，学名 Thamnophilus palliatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in southeastern Peru's Cuzco and Puno departments, across northern Bolivia, and in Brazil south of the Amazon east to the Tapajós River

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: similis is found in central Peru between the departments of Huánuco and Junín. The chestnut-backed antshrike inhabits a variety of landscapes most of which are somewhat open
